title: Mob Mondays
description: A mod with the goal of adding interesting new mobs to Minecraft. Hopefully updated on Mondays ;)
body:
This mod has a similar goal to mods like Alex's Mods, Naturalist, or Mo Creatures. In where I plan on adding all kinds of new mobs to enhance Minecraft with new world-building, features, and of course drops.

The goal is that this mod will be like a series where on Mondays or every couple of Mondays because I doubt I'll actually be able to update every Monday. I will add a new mob or mobs. As well as new items and features related to those mobs. Mobs will range from real-life-inspired animals, to fantasy, or even more goofier ideas.

Showcase Videos with more detail: https://www.youtube.com/playlist?list=PLnDlAGDQtYpuI5Y9PKjqck23dl0t2FrI-

All New Mobs (So Far):
Moobloom
 - Yellow Flower Moobloom from 2020 Mob Vote. Similar to Cow, but you can use a bottle to "milk" it for honey. Spawns in Flower Forests.

Blue Orchid Moobloom
- Similar to the Moobloom, but spawns in swamp biomes

Lily of the Valley Moobloom
- Similar to the Moobloom, but poisons you if you come to close.
* Heisenberg Moobloom 
- (Breaking Bad Easter egg for the Lily of the Valley Moobloom)

Wither Rose Moobloom
- Moobloom that spawns in Soul Sand Valleys. Withers you if you get too close.

Chocolate Cow
- Cow that gives you Chocolate Milk.

Strawberry Cow
- Cow that gives you Strawberry Milk.

Soy Cow
- Cow that gives you Soy Milk.

Wooly Cow
- Cow Variant that spawns in Snowy & Taiga Biomes

Albino Cow
- Cow that's Albino

Holy Cow
- Majestic Cow that can be grant you bottles of xp, apples to golden apples, and more.

Turkey
- Similar to Chicken.

Punching Bag
- Can be spawned in with two hay bales and pumpkin on top. Its only purpose is for the player to test out weapons and combat abilities on this completely harmless innocent being. Or just punch to let off some steam.

Pinata
- Same as Punching Bag, but can be spawned in with Glazed Light Blue Terracota, Glazed Red Terracota, and then a pumpkin on top. It also will drop many sweet food items like cookies, pie, cake, and a new food item: candy. Candy is a very low food source that has the chance to give you a sugar rush.

Testificate Man - A Batman-inspired Villager Guardian who fights hostile mobs. Inspired by Element Animation's Testificate Man. I couldn't figure out how to spawn them in villages. So I made them able to spawn in biomes that villages can spawn in like plains, deserts, taiga, etc. Abilities: Has a chance to teleport randomly when damaged and leave behind some smoke particles. Has a chance to go invisible when damaged. Has a chance to spawn bats. Has a chance to do multiple abilities. Drops: Totem of Testificate Man Totem makes the player invisible while equipped. When right-clicked it will teleport the player in a random direction. Basically a multi-use chorus fruit

The Chillager -  My version of the Iceologer from the 2020 mob vote. It throws ice blocks that when they hit the player will summon falling ice blocks that do a bit of damage and apply a freeze effect to the player for a bit. They spawn in mountain or ice biomes. Drops: Totem of Chill Totem grants player slow fall and jump boost while in held by the player. This is helpful for climbing tall mountains.

The Griefer -  A joker inspired illager. He throws tnt at the player that explode immediately if they hit the player. Upon death he will explode and summon a creeper. Drops: Totem of Grief Totem gives the player strong resistance while in the player's main hand. It can be right-clicked to create a small explosion near the player. This can be used to damage nearby mobs. And even to do rocket jumps. However, this ability will cost food points, xp, and even has a chance to fail.

The Gambler - A two-face inspired illager. This illager has an appearance of half a villager and half an illager. It attacks by punching the player. It's ability is that it has a 50/50 chance to either give positive effects to the player or negative effects. Making it either an easier fight or a harder one. Drops: Totem of Chances Totem's ability is only used when right-clicked with. This will have a 50/50 chance to either insta heal the player or give a wither effect. It also has a 50/50 chance to vanish from the player's inventory.
